data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL for data in motion, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Offers two-factor authentication to enhance account security.
data.technical_spec: Supports TOTP and SMS-based verification for users.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors for suspicious activities within network traffic.
data.technical_spec: Uses heuristic and signature-based approaches to detect intrusions.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic evaluations to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employment of third-party security experts for unbiased analysis.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Provides users options to control their data visibility and sharing.
data.technical_spec: Includes settings for profile privacy and data sharing permissions.
